name: Chow Sai the Ghost Stopper
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>塞</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>師</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> チョウサイ
desc: Neither player can activate the effects of Spell/Trap Cards in the GY. If this card is sent from the field to your GY: You can target 1 Spell/Trap in your opponent's GY; banish it.
mnst_eff: Neither player can activate the effects of Spell/Trap Cards in the GY. If this card is sent from the field to your GY: You can target 1 Spell/Trap in your opponent's GY; banish it.
eff: Neither player can activate the effects of Spell/Trap Cards in the GY. If this card is sent from the field to your GY: You can target 1 Spell/Trap in your opponent's GY; banish it.

sets.set: Speed Duel: Streets of Battle City

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
